examples: He pulled an awful boner by mentioning his dead father.
I am afraid you have pulled a boner this time. Your staff are all laughing up their sleeves.
I am afraid you have pull a boner this time. Your staff members are all laughing up their sleeves.
This fall will mark the 100th anniversary of "Merkle's Boner, " a base-running goof by the New York Giants' Fred Merkle that helped blow the 1908 National League pennant to the Chicago Cubs.
